ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-15-2012 Continued To Jun-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-01-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Shawn Perez for and with David Browning.

Mr. Perez stated that there was a tax claim in the amount of $707,000.00 in the estate of Amy Browning, that there were a few credit cards, that the payment of the tax claim was $70,000.00 per year and that it looks like it could be paid from the other half of Ms. Brownining's estate. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the written order). Bond in the amount of $763,000.00 is required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
